channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Telegram used to share rape videos and drugging tips, prosecutors allege
item.description: Court documents state suspects posted attack videos and referred to women as 'cars,' sedatives as 'fuel,' and rape as 'driving.'

item.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is over, calls negotiations 'waste of time'
item.description: Oil prices surged 5% after President Trump stated negotiations with Iran were over, calling them 'a waste of time.'

item.title: Trump and Zelenskyy scheduled to meet at NATO summit in Turkey
item.description: The meeting occurs as Ukraine faces an urgent shortage of ammunition.

item.title: How Democrats could replace Platner in Maine Senate race and potential successors
item.description: Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner says he is weighing his options, but state and national Democrats urge him to withdraw.
